site_description: A structured, phase-based education framework for child development from birth to 18.
home_subtitle: A developmental framework for ages 0-18. Eleven targets, evidence-based methods, {universeCount} content universes, calibrated to each child's profile.
home_framework_desc: Philosophy, principles, targets, and operational guidance. The foundation everything else is built on.
home_age_desc: Developmental priorities, activities, mental models, and content for each stage. From neural foundations to launch.
home_domain_desc: Track a single thread across all ages: Communication, Music, Mind & Body, Social, Building, and more.
home_universe_desc: Books, films, games, maker systems, and literary canons. The content library that drives the framework.
